title: Looking for Teacher at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates!
